    update(Auteur) - Method in class dao.controllers.AuteurDAO
    This method updates an existing author in the database.
    update(Genre) - Method in class dao.controllers.GenreDAO
    This method updates an existing genre in the database.
    update(Livre) - Method in class dao.controllers.LivreDAO
    This method updates an existing book in the database.
    update(Pret) - Method in class dao.controllers.PretDAO
    This method updates an existing loan in the database.
    update(Usager) - Method in class dao.controllers.UsagerDAO
     
    Usager - Class in models
    This class represents a user in the database.
    Usager(int, String, String, int, boolean) - Constructor for class models.Usager
    Constructor to create a User object with the specified ID, last name, first name, year of birth, and reduced rate status.
    UsagerAddForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.usager
    This class represents a form for adding a new user (usager).
    UsagerAddForm() - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.usager.UsagerAddForm
    Constructor for the UsagerAddForm.
    UsagerDAO - Class in dao.controllers
    This class is used to manage the Usager (User) data in the database.
    UsagerDAO() - Constructor for class dao.controllers.UsagerDAO
     
    UsagerDeleteForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.usager
    This class represents a form for confirming the deletion of a user.
    UsagerDeleteForm(Usager) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.usager.UsagerDeleteForm
    Constructor for the UsagerDeleteForm.
    UsagerForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.usager
    This abstract class serves as a base for user-related forms in the application.
    UsagerForm(String, String) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.usager.UsagerForm
    Constructor for the UsagerForm.
    UsagerGUI - Class in ui.gui
    This class represents the GUI for managing users (Usagers).
    UsagerGUI() - Constructor for class ui.gui.UsagerGUI
    Constructor for the UsagerGUI.
    UsagerModifyForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.usager
    This class represents a form for modifying an existing user.
    UsagerModifyForm(Usager) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.usager.UsagerModifyForm
    Constructor for the UsagerModifyForm.
    UsagerView - Class in ui.gui.views
    This class represents a view for displaying the details of a user.
    UsagerView(Usager) - Constructor for class ui.gui.views.UsagerView
    Constructor for UsagerView.
    UserByYearView - Class in ui.gui.views
    This class represents a view for displaying the number of users by their birth year.
    UserByYearView() - Constructor for class ui.gui.views.UserByYearView
    Constructor for UserByYearView.
